prompt: A cinematic anime illustration of an elf girl with long white hair in twin tails wearing a white and gold dress holding a brown briefcase on a stone balcony. Beside her is a pillar with potted blue flowers. In the background, a girl with long purple hair in a black dress looks out over a sprawling fantasy European city with a castle and ocean. A white bird flies in the foreground. The top right features elegant typography reading "葬送のフリーレン", "F R I E R E N", and "アニメーション原画展". The artwork is framed by a thin decorative border.
